pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3.x does not support Java 17; compilation or runtime failures occur due to unsupported bytecode version or removed internal APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 8, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing class version mismatches if mixed with Java 17 dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JSTL dependency required for JSP support in newer Spring Boot/Tomcat versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.6+ and Tomcat 9+ removed JSTL from the default classpath; without this dependency, JSP pages using JSTL tags fail at runtime with ClassNotFoundException.
